attr.title: Slay the Spire
attr.desc: Ascend a mysterious spire filled with deadly enemies, bizarre events, and powerful relics. Build your deck one card at a time, discover devastating synergies, and adapt your strategy with every run. No two climbs are ever the same.
attr.inst: Install the Steam version of the game - Doesnt matter for what OS and then copy the desktop-1.0.jar to the slaythespire folder!
